info.title: Aura Bank Financial Action Group
info.description: Provides the Resolution Agent with write access to execute state-mutating financial operations on Aura Bank accounts. These actions are irreversible and should only be performed after human approval has been confirmed for critical tickets.

post.summary: Issue a refund or goodwill credit to a customer account
post.description: Credits a specified refund amount to a customer's bank account and logs the transaction. Only call this after human approval has been confirmed. Requires the account_id (UUID) from the get_account_balances tool and the exact positive refund amount in GBP.

account_id.description: The UUID account_id of the account to credit. Obtain this from get_account_balances.

amount.description: The positive refund amount in GBP (e.g. 50.0). Must be greater than zero.

success.description: Confirmation message if the refund was applied successfully.

new_balance.description: The updated account balance after the refund.

error.description: Present only if the operation failed.

post.summary: Suspend a customer's bank account or credit card
post.description: Sets an Aura Bank account or credit card status to Suspended. Use this when a customer reports a lost or stolen card, or when active fraud is confirmed. This action is immediate and irreversible without manual reactivation by a support manager.

account_id.description: The UUID account_id of the account or card to suspend. Obtain this from get_account_balances.

success.description: Confirmation message if the suspension was applied successfully.

error.description: Present only if the operation failed.
